item.title: EasyRec 1.15
item.description:
easyRec 1.15

  • Silence watchdog: alert banner shown in-app if the audio capture pipeline stops delivering buffers or records only digital silence
  • Persistent diagnostic log: events are now written incrementally to ~/Library/Application Support/EasyRec/Logs/latest.log — no more lost diagnostics if you forget to export
  • Detailed audio-capture events logged (stream start/stop, first buffer, periodic buffer rate and RMS levels, digital-silence streaks)
